title: Microsoft Teams vs Webex
description: Compare Microsoft Teams vs Webex in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right communication tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Microsoft Teams emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Microsoft Teams or Webex?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Microsoft Teams edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Microsoft Teams excels at Microsoft Teams is the communication and collaboration platform at the center of, while Webex is stronger for Webex is a communication platform that helps Enterprises and Government and Heal.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Microsoft Teams and Webex?
faqs.answer: Microsoft Teams and Webex differ in pricing (Free – $12.50/mo per user vs Free – $25/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Microsoft Teams cheaper than Webex?
faqs.answer: Microsoft Teams starts at Free – $12.50/mo per user while Webex starts at Free – $25/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Microsoft Teams or Webex?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for communication. Microsoft Teams scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Microsoft Teams and Webex together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Microsoft Teams or Webex?
faqs.answer: Both Microsoft Teams and Webex prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which communication tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Webex for large teams, while Microsoft Teams may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free – $12.50/mo per user pricing.
